display_name: POND COMBO: ugly_chart + mtf_neg (chart_score<=49.9 AND chart_mtf_score<=-0.01) ON TOP of the fleet entry stack. 2026-06-09 in-pond mine, held-out TEST: WR 81%, +$1.79/tr, n=161 across 22 tokens (~12 tr/day).
